queue_item.action: Recover and formalize the evolution of the project term 'proof' into distinct trust and truth layers.
required_evidence: explicit observed, inferred, proposed, contradiction, and unresolved records

progress.finding: The unqualified term 'proof' now hides at least nine non-substitutable layers: correlation, byte provenance, builder trust, workflow authorization, signature authenticity, metadata freshness, replay acceptance, runtime or deployment observation, and claim truth.
progress.decision: Future evidence artifacts should name the exact layer established and state adjacent layers not established.
progress.contradiction_resolved: Manifest inclusion and byte closure do not imply OIDC verification; attestation does not imply claim truth.
progress.source_scope: Public repository files and commit metadata only
progress.privacy_boundary: Raw private chat, health and pet-health material, credentials, live tokens, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads were excluded.

queue_item.handoff: Cloudflare and Frontier should adopt qualified proof-layer fields in the integrated invocation receipt; Vercel and Independent Creative Web should use the same vocabulary when describing runtime and deployment evidence.

next_action: Add proof_layer_established and proof_layers_not_established fields to shared evidence schemas, then execute one end-to-end receipt binding metadata, signature, claims, replay, mutation or deployment, and resulting identity.
